response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X) or embedded switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development skills
Proven ability to work in cross-functional and DevOps environments
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded contexts or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a hard requirement
No experience with LAN-switch hardware, embedded networking, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X
